name: Lemon Broccoli Chicken
recipeInstructions:
1. Cut 4 thin lemon slices; squeeze the juice from the remaining lemon into a small bowl.
2. Set aside.
3. Heat vegetable oil in a large skillet over medium heat. Cook chicken, turning occasionally, until browned and cooked through, about 10 minutes. Remove chicken from the skillet and set aside.
4. Add any reserved fat to the skillet. Combine the cream of broccoli soup, milk, lemon juice, and pepper in a small bowl.
5. Return the chicken to the skillet and top with lemon slices.
6. Cover and cook over low heat for 5 minutes or until the chicken is no longer pink. Stir often.
7. Garnish with fresh thyme before serving.
